headline: Lockheed Martin Price Target Slashed to $571 by Citi: Is the Defense Trade Stuck in Neutral?
summary: Citi lowered its price target on Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) to $571 from $675, while maintaining a Neutral rating. The price target cut lands as LMT stock trades at $518.41, well below the firm’s revised mark. For prudent investors, the takeaway on LMT stock is that the defense trade may stay range-bound until the macro backdrop ... headline: Nokia Extends AI And 5G Reach Across Telecom And Defense Markets
summary: Nokia Oyj (HLSE:NOKIA) has introduced new agentic AI capabilities for its fixed network products, aimed at more intelligent, self-optimizing broadband operations. The company also revealed a modular, open-architecture 5G solution for defense, developed in partnership with Lockheed Martin for U.S. and allied forces. These announcements extend Nokia's AI and commercial 5G know-how into both telecom operator networks and military communication systems. Nokia sits at the intersection of telecom...
